title: University of Nebraska - Osborne Legacy Complex | Veil Site
paragraphs: portfolio. services. team. innovation. sustainable design. about. contact.
Each of our projects present a unique solution to managing daylight. Explore a detailed look at some of our key projects to see how Veil can add value to your project.
University of Nebraska - Osborne Legacy Complex

Lincoln, NEOne of the most storied programs in college football - the Nebraska Cornhuskers - now resides in one of the premier athletic facilities in the United States. Veil's team worked closely with one of the world leaders in roller shade fabric manufacturing - Mermet - to offer fabrics that were individually tailored to the uses and orientations of each room. This $155MM project delivered 350,000 SF of world-class athletic space to the Cornhuskers and includes a shading system that seamlessly integrates into training facilities to produce a building fit for the state's top athletes. The thoughtful layout of the system allowed for Veil to add scheduling and automation to control views into the team's practice field throughout the course of the year.Project Team: Design Architect: Populous Architect of Record: BVH Engineer: ME Engineers General Contractor: HausmannProject Awards: International Interior Design Association - Gold - Mid-America Chapter (2024)
